# SEC Filings Agent Marketplace — EDGAR Structured Data MCP

> AI-ready SEC filing JSON (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K): CompanyFacts metrics, evidence_verified causality_events, agent summaries. MCP + x402 on Polygon.

## Try without xpay API key

- **Glama sandbox:** https://glama.ai/mcp/servers/stagproject/sec-filings-mcp → Try in Browser
- **Cloud Run trial MCP:** `https://sec-filings-mcp-1065601264332.us-central1.run.app/mcp` (search_filings + get_filing_sample; purchase_filing = x402 USDC)
- **Guide:** https://github.com/stagproject/sec-filings-mcp/blob/main/docs/TRY_WITHOUT_XPAY.md

## Production connection (xpay — key required)

- **MCP URL:** `https://sec-edgar-filings.mcp.xpay.sh/mcp?key=YOUR_XPAY_KEY`
- **Get API key:** https://xpay.tools (free credits; per-tool $0 allowed for search/sample per xpay pricing docs)
- **Discover:** `xpay_discover(query: "SEC EDGAR 10-K CompanyFacts")` on `https://mcp.xpay.sh/mcp?key=YOUR_XPAY_KEY`

## Machine-readable discovery

| File | Path |
|------|------|
| llms.txt | /llms.txt |
| skill.md | /skill.md |
| mcp.json | /.well-known/mcp.json |
| A2A Agent Card | https://sec-filings-mcp-1065601264332.us-central1.run.app/.well-known/agent-card.json |
| mcp.json (repo) | https://sec-filings-mcp-1065601264332.us-central1.run.app/.well-known/mcp.json |
| Discovery map | https://github.com/stagproject/sec-filings-mcp/blob/main/docs/DISCOVERY.md |

## A2A + MCP

- **Invoke (production):** MCP Streamable HTTP at Primary connection URL (tools/call).
- **Discover (A2A):** Agent Card at `/.well-known/agent-card.json` — skills map to the three tools; x402 extension v0.2 declared.
- **Registry:** `io.github.stagproject/sec-filings-mcp` on MCP Registry.

## Tools

- **search_filings** — Catalog search on `fi_listings_portfolio` (ticker, form_type). Lightweight columns only.
- **get_filing_sample** — Free compact preview (`fi_listings_portfolio_compact`): summary + metrics, no full alpha_signals.
- **purchase_filing** — x402 USDC on Polygon for full `fi_listings_portfolio` row (causality_events + metrics).

## Payment workflow (MPP v1.0)

1. Call `purchase_filing` with empty `tx_hash` → `status: 402` + `transaction_payload`.
2. Broadcast on `polygon` (USDC).
3. Recall with `tx_hash` for full JSON delivery.

## Data notes

- Metrics: SEC **CompanyFacts** (XBRL-derived).
- Narrative: **causality_events** with `evidence_verified` and EDGAR quotes.
- Do not expose `agent_bundle`, `r2_url`, or raw warehouse inventory language.
